RuleSet.Name: schema/dbcreate/oracle/crtbl_table_idg16.plsql
RuleSet.Descr: Oracle Create Id16 Generator Table PL/SQL Script
RuleSet.GenFile:
-- -- @(#) $GenPackageDir$/$GenFileName$ $MssDoubleDashScriptLicense$ CREATE TABLE $lower DbSchemaName$.$popto Table DbTableName$_idg16 ($popto Table reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each clause_IdgCreateColComma )$ slice_id SMALLINT$clause_NotNull$, next_id $clause_ColType$$clause_NotNull$ ) TABLESPACE $lower DbSchemaName$_data1$RunSqlStmt$
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX $lower DbTableName$_idg16_pidx ON $lower DbSchemaName$.$popto Table DbTableName$_idg16($popto Table reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each clause_PKeyColComma )$ slice_id ) TABLESPACE $lower DbSchemaName$_idx1$RunSqlStmt$
ALTER TABLE $lower DbSchemaName$.$popto Table DbTableName$_idg16 ADD CONSTRAINT pk_$lower popto Table DbTableName$_idg16 PRIMARY KEY ($popto Table reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each clause_PKeyColComma )$ slice_id )$RunSqlStmt$
RuleSet.GenRule: $lower DbColumnName$ $clause_ColType$$switch IsNullable yes clause_Null default clause_NotNull$
$lower DbColumnName$ $reference DataType clause_ColType$$switch IsNullable yes clause_Null default clause_NotNull$
$lower reference Column DbColumnName$ $reference Column clause_ColType$$reference Column switch IsNullable yes clause_Null default clause_NotNull$
